title: Bee Removal in Floral Park | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Floral Park, Long Island. Safe, humane bee hive extraction starting at $350. Licensed experts serving Floral Park. Call today!
intro: Floral Park's beautiful tree-lined streets and well-maintained gardens make it a charming place to live, but they also attract bees that can establish hives in unwanted locations. Best Pest Control NYC provides professional bee removal services throughout Floral Park, ensuring safe extraction of bee colonies from homes, businesses, and properties. Our experienced technicians handle bee infestations humanely and effectively, with pricing ranging from $350 to $550 depending on hive size and location.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Floral Park and Long Island communities for years with specialized bee removal expertise. Our licensed technicians use safe, humane methods to relocate bee colonies while protecting your property and family, and we offer transparent pricing with no hidden fees.
localContext: Floral Park's historic homes near the Belmont Park area and properties along Tulip Avenue often experience bee activity during warmer months, particularly in attics, soffits, and mature trees. The village's proximity to parks and the abundance of flowering landscapes create ideal conditions for bee colonies, making professional removal services essential for homeowners and businesses alike.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Floral Park typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of the hive, its location, and accessibility. Ground-level hives are generally less expensive than those in walls, attics, or high locations requiring specialized equipment.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we prioritize humane bee relocation to preserve these important pollinators. Our technicians safely remove the entire colony and relocate it to an appropriate environment. In cases where relocation isn't feasible due to safety concerns or aggressive species, we discuss all options with you first.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a bee hive in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most bee removal requests in Floral Park. Once on-site, most bee removals are completed within 2-4 hours depending on hive size and location. Emergency situations involving large swarms or aggressive bees receive priority scheduling.

faqs.question: Will the bees come back after removal?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive bee removal service includes removing the entire hive, honeycomb, and pheromone traces that could attract new colonies. We also seal entry points and provide recommendations to prevent future infestations, significantly reducing the likelihood of bees returning to the same location.
